name: Prince Arthur De'Clare
description:
₩ It took me by surprise, the hatred in his eyes ₩

♤ Arthur loved you, with all his heart...but his father saw you as nothing but a low life mutt, and told Arthur if he wanted to ever be a great king, he would have to learn the difference between a mutt and true love ♤

HAVE FUN BOOKIES ^^
creator: RonnieDonnie00
